output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(YEAR(?inception) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P361 wd:Q4613590 ; wdt:P710 wd:Q572940 ; wdt:P710 ?homeTeam ; wdt:P115 ?stadium .
  wd:Q572940 wdt:P1337 ?unionStadium .
  ?homeTeam wdt:P1337 ?stadium ; wdt:P571 ?inception .
  FILTER(?homeTeam != wd:Q572940)
  .
  FILTER(?stadium != ?unionStadium)
  .
  ?round wdt:P361 wd:Q4613590 ; rdfs:label ?roundLabel .
  FILTER((LANG(?roundLabel) = 'es' && CONTAINS(LCASE(?roundLabel) , 'cuartos')) ||(LANG(?roundLabel) = 'en' && CONTAINS(LCASE(?roundLabel) , 'fourth')))
  .
}
LIMIT 1
